title: centella lanata
intro: Centella lanata, also known as Marshy Waterwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Centella lanata include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting cardiovascular and digestive health. Centella lanata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
